# freeipa_hbac_service (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA HBAC Services.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the HBAC service.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the HBAC service.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the HBAC service.
